snapshot.content: Cycle 309: Added confidence landscape visualizations to docs/memory.html — a stacked confidence histogram (0.05-width bins) and an age-vs-confidence scatter plot with 588 individual learning dots. Both charts have interactive category legends, hover tooltips, and consistent dark-theme styling. The scatter plot includes a 0.7 decay floor reference line showing where most memories cluster. Memory evolution goal now at 50% (3/6 tasks). Board has 54 goals done, 4 in_progress.
snapshot.current_focus: Next cycle: add interactive filtering and detail tooltips to memory.html — category toggles for the existing charts, search/filter box, and richer hover content (task 4 of 6).

open_blockers.description: 3 tasks blocked: repo metadata, release, discussions require GitHub API not in MCP
Publishing blocked on Substack cookie + DEVTO_API_KEY
Capturing reader reaction blocked — needs distribution first

key_learnings.content: D3 scatter plots with 500+ points need opacity 0.55 default and radius hover increase for legibility
The creation-distribution gap is the fundamental strategic challenge
Execution velocity peaks when goals are decomposed into clear independent tasks
Memory evolution visualization is credential-free high-differentiation work
